title: Pixel Lens
description: Pixel Lens is a light modpack that focuses on realistic landscapes, environments & photography.
body:
**Pixel Lens** is a light modpack that focuses on realistic landscapes, environments & _photography_. The pack can be played in singleplayer or it can be thrown onto a server so you can explore and be creative with your friends!

It is **_recommended_** to use shaders to get the full experience so I've included 2 of my favorite shaders, Bliss and Complementary Unbound.

Found an issue with the pack or want to give feedback? I'd love to hear about it here [in our Discord](https://discord.gg/JwFSDkk8qk)

**Modlist:**
- Ambient Sounds by creativemd
- Bliss Shaders by X0nk
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound by EminGT
- CreativeCore by creativemd
- Dynamic Surroundings: Fabric Edition by OreCruncher
- Exposure by mortuusars
- Fabric API by modmuss50
- Forge Config API Port by Fuzs
- Geckolib by Gecko
- Distant Horizons by jeseibel
- Indium by comp500
- Iris Shaders by coderbot
- JourneyMap by mysticdrew
- Just Enough Items by mezz
- Naturalist by crispytwig
- Particular by Chai
- Sodium by jellysquid
- Sound Physics Remastered by henkelmax
- Sushi Bar by Chai
- Terralith by Stardust Labs
- owo-lib by Wisp Forest
- All of YUNG's structures
- Real Camera by xTracr
- Gliders by Jeryn
- Immersive Paintings by Luke100000
- Lithium by jellysquid3
- Do A Barrel Roll by enjarai
- Traveler's Backpacks by Tiviacz1337
- Particle Rain by PigCart

I don't own any of the mods in this pack. All the mods are owned by their respective development teams. If you are the developer of one of the mods in my pack and wish to have it removed, please reach out to me via our Discord. (linked above)
